Topic: Causal Inference

## Used in courses

- [EC202 - Applied Econometrics](../../course/ec202/ec202.html) [course]

## Lectures

<div class="lf-listing-card"><a href="../../collection/lecture-04/lecture-04.html" class="lf-listing-link">Lecture 4 - Endogeneity and IV</a> <span class="lf-listing-badge">lecture</span><p class="lf-listing-desc">ec202</p></div>

## Concepts

<div class="lf-listing-card"><a href="../../concept/iv-intuition/iv-intuition.html" class="lf-listing-link">Instrumental Variables Intuition</a> <span class="lf-listing-badge">concept</span><p class="lf-listing-desc">ec202</p></div>

## Exercises

<div class="lf-listing-card"><a href="../../exercise/ex-iv-concept-check/ex-iv-concept-check.html" class="lf-listing-link">IV intuition check</a> <span class="lf-listing-badge">exercise</span><p class="lf-listing-desc">ec202</p></div>

## Figures

<div class="lf-listing-card"><a href="../../figure/iv-dag-figure/iv-dag-figure.html" class="lf-listing-link">IV DAG</a> <span class="lf-listing-badge">figure</span><p class="lf-listing-desc">ec202</p></div>

## Resources

<div class="lf-listing-card"><a href="../../resource/angrist-podcast-iv/angrist-podcast-iv.html" class="lf-listing-link">Instrumental Variables Episode</a> <span class="lf-listing-badge">resource</span><p class="lf-listing-desc">ec202</p></div>
